title: Golden World
description: Adds balanced and thought out features that enhance the game in a simple but deep way. [!EARLY BETA!]
body:
# GOLDEN WORLD
This mod is in very early development and will be recieving updates. I am open to any suggestions that expand upon existing features or create new ones.

## 📝 CURRENT FEATURES 📝


<details>
<summary>Tungsten</summary>
Tough and resistant  material that can be used for its wieght, defensive and fire resistant properties.

## Tungsten Armor
As an inbetween of iron and diamond, tungsten provides 16 defense. It has a unique property along with the solid defense; it extinguishes the player when they are on fire, as long as they are not standig in any active sources.

## Tungsten Weapons
Mostly an inbetween of iron and diamond, but some are slower and heavier, like the axe. Tungsten things also have a much higher durability than iron, but cannot be repaired.

## Tungsten Gauntlet
Attacks as fast as your fist but does more damage.

## Tungtsen Ball
A heavy, damaging throwable weapon that scales velocity with how much strength you have.
</details>
